---
title: "JobTrackeR"
---

A R package for tracking job applications built with my team in ADC 405.

<iframe src="https://adc-405-s26.github.io/jobtrackeR/articles/introduction-to-jobtrackr.html" 
        width="100%" 
        height="850px" 
        style="border: none; border-radius: 8px;">
</iframe>
